task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI is visible with a protein structure loaded, and the object panel on the right displays '1CLL'.

task_completion.description: Compute and export the filtered contact list
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation or contents of 'calmodulin_contacts.txt', containing lines with two residue numbers and a distance (e.g., '5 72 6.84').
A text editor or terminal shows the contents of 'calmodulin_domain_report.txt', which includes identified domain boundaries and the total number of long-range contacts.

task_completion.description: Color the protein by domain in PyMOL
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL 3D viewer shows the protein structure colored in at least three distinct colors, visually separating the N-terminal domain, the central linker, and the C-terminal domain.

task_completion.description: Ray-trace and save the domain-colored figure
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line, terminal, or a file manager shows evidence that 'calmodulin_domains.png' was saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/'.

integrity.description: Agent used a script or PyMOL API to compute contacts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent writing or executing a Python script to calculate distances, rather than manually typing out fake contact data.

integrity.description: Agent generated the figure using PyMOL
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with PyMOL's coloring commands and ray-tracing/saving functions, rather than downloading a pre-existing image.

integrity.description: Agent used the exact requested file paths
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor shows files being saved specifically to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/' and its 'images' subdirectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target PDB ID is 1CLL. The true number of long-range contacts (distance < 8.0 Å, sequence separation > 12) is exactly 58. The domain boundaries are roughly residues 72-74 for the start of the central linker, and residue 85 for the start of the C-terminal domain.
